---
title: "zbtb20_snrnaseq_overlap"
author: "G Sejourne"
date: "2025-10-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggupset)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gplots)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
# read in differentially expressed and layer-enriched genes from p28 vis ctx snrnaseq
wilcox_astro <- read.csv("./data/ASTRO_Wilcoxon_results_250106.csv")
upper <- read.csv("./data/upper_genes_WT.csv")
deep <- read.csv("./data/deep_genes_WT.csv")
mid <- read.csv("./data/mid_genes_WT.csv")
WM <- read.csv("./data/WM_genes_WT.csv")

wilcox_astro_diff <- wilcox_astro[wilcox_astro$KO_p<=0.05 & abs(wilcox_astro$KO_l) >= log(1.25, 2),]$KO_n

#chose a log2 fold change cut off of 1.8
upper_enriched <- upper[upper$pvals_adj<=0.05 & (upper$logfoldchanges) >= log(1.8, 2),]$names
deep_enriched <- deep[deep$pvals_adj<=0.05 & (deep$logfoldchanges) >= log(1.8, 2),]$names
mid_enriched <- upper[mid$pvals_adj<=0.05 & (mid$logfoldchanges) >= log(1.8, 2),]$names
WM_enriched <- WM[WM$pvals_adj<=0.05 & (WM$logfoldchanges) >= log(1.8, 2),]$names

layer_enriched <- c(upper_enriched, deep_enriched, mid_enriched, WM_enriched)

```


```{r cars}
# read in genes with zbtb20-bound promoters
TSS_peaks <- read.table("zbtb20_astro_promoters_TSS.bed")

zbtb20_targets <- TSS_peaks$V4
zbtb20_targets_astro <- zbtb20_targets[zbtb20_targets %in% wilcox_astro$KO_n]

# identify genes bound by zbtb20, differentially expressed, and layer-enriched (_layer) or not layer-enriched (_other)
x <-list(wilcox_astro_diff, zbtb20_targets_astro, layer_enriched)
names(x) <- c("KOvWT", "zbtb20", "layer")
v.table <- gplots::venn(x)
v.table

de_bound_layer <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`KOvWT:zbtb20:layer`
de_bound_other <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`KOvWT:zbtb20`
bound_layer <- c(attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:layer`)
bound_other <- c(attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20`)

# build frequency table of bound and unbound layer-enriched and non-layer-enriched DEGs
bound_layer_deg <- data.frame(
                        DEG = c("TRUE", "TRUE", "FALSE", "FALSE"),
                        layer = c("TRUE", "FALSE", "TRUE", "FALSE"),
                        count = c(length(de_bound_layer), length(de_bound_other), length(bound_layer), length(bound_other))) %>%
  group_by(layer) %>%
  mutate(pct = 100* count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

bound_layer_deg
write.csv(bound_layer_deg, file = "layer_deg_contingency.csv")
```


```{r}
# identify layer of enrichment for zbtb20-bound layer-enriched genes
x <-list(zbtb20_targets, upper_enriched, mid_enriched, deep_enriched, WM_enriched)
names(x) <- c("zbtb20", "UPPER", "MID", "DEEP", "WM")
v.table <- gplots::venn(x)
v.table

upper_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:UPPER`
mid_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:MID`
upper_mid_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:UPPER:MID`
deep_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:DEEP`
WM_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:WM`
deep_WM_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`zbtb20:DEEP:WM`
other_bound <- attr(v.table,"intersections")$zbtb20

# make frequency table for layer of enrichment of zbtb20 targets
bound_layers <- data.frame(
                        layer = c("upper", "mid", "upper_mid", "deep", "WM", "deep_WM", "other"),
                        count = c(length(upper_bound), length(mid_bound), length(upper_mid_bound), length(deep_bound), length(WM_bound), length(deep_WM_bound), length(other_bound)))

bound_layers
write.csv(bound_layers, file = "bound_layers.csv")

# make table of zbtb20 targets with layer enrichment
df_upper_bound <- data.frame(gene = upper_bound, layer = "upper")
df_mid_bound <- data.frame(gene = mid_bound, layer = "mid")
df_upper_mid_bound <- data.frame(gene = upper_mid_bound, layer = "upper_mid")
df_deep_bound <- data.frame(gene = deep_bound, layer = "deep")
df_WM_bound <- data.frame(gene = WM_bound, layer = "WM")
df_deep_WM_bound <- data.frame(gene = deep_WM_bound, layer = "deep_WM")

bound_layer_genes <- rbind(df_upper_bound, df_mid_bound, df_upper_mid_bound, df_deep_bound, df_WM_bound, df_deep_WM_bound)

write.csv(bound_layer_genes, file = "zbtb20_bound_layer_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
# identify layer of enrichment for zbtb20-bound DEGs
# read in DEGs from snrnaseq dataset
x <-list(wilcox_astro_diff, zbtb20_targets)
names(x) <- c("KOvWT", "zbtb20")
v.table <- gplots::venn(x)
v.table

# make frequency table for layer of enrichment of zbtb20 targets
de_zbtb20_targets <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`KOvWT:zbtb20`

x <-list(de_zbtb20_targets, upper_enriched, mid_enriched, deep_enriched, WM_enriched)
names(x) <- c("de_zbtb20", "UPPER", "MID", "DEEP", "WM")
v.table <- gplots::venn(x)
v.table

# make table of zbtb20 targets that are DEGs with layer enrichment
de_upper_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`de_zbtb20:UPPER`
de_mid_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`de_zbtb20:MID`
de_upper_mid_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`de_zbtb20:UPPER:MID`
de_deep_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`de_zbtb20:DEEP`
de_WM_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`de_zbtb20:WM`
de_deep_WM_bound <- attr(v.table, "intersections")$`de_zbtb20:DEEP:WM`
de_other_bound <- attr(v.table,"intersections")$de_zbtb20

de_bound_layers <- data.frame(
                        layer = c("upper", "mid", "upper_mid", "deep", "WM", "deep_WM", "other"),
                        count = c(length(de_upper_bound), length(de_mid_bound), length(de_upper_mid_bound), length(de_deep_bound), length(de_WM_bound), length(de_deep_WM_bound), length(de_other_bound)))

de_bound_layers

write.csv(de_bound_layers, file = "diff_exp_bound_layers.csv")
```

```{r}
#add percentage column
de_bound_layers <- de_bound_layers[!(de_bound_layers$layer == "other"),]  %>% 
  mutate(Frequency = paste(round(100 * count / sum(count), digits = 1)))
de_bound_layers$DEG = "DEG"
bound_layers <- bound_layers[!(bound_layers$layer == "other"),]  %>% 
  mutate(Frequency = paste(round(100 * count / sum(count), digits = 1)))
bound_layers$DEG = "ALL"

layer_table <- rbind(bound_layers, de_bound_layers) 
layer_table$Frequency <- as.numeric(layer_table$Frequency)

```


```{r}
bound_layers$Frequency <- as.numeric(bound_layers$Frequency)
# change order of layers
bound_layers$layer <- factor(bound_layers$layer, levels = c("upper", "upper_mid", "mid", "deep", "deep_WM", "WM"))

# Basic piechart
my_colors = c(upper = "magenta", upper_mid = "plum1", mid = "green2",deep = "yellow", WM = "cyan", deep_WM = "olivedrab1")

p <- ggplot(bound_layers, aes(x="", y=Frequency, fill=layer)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", linewidth=0.5, color="black") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) +
  
  theme_void() + # remove background, grid, numeric labels

  #geom_textpath(aes(label = layer, x = 1.2), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 6, position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), hjust = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors,
                    labels = levels(bound_layers$layer),
                    name = "Layer") +
  ggtitle("All layer genes") +
  theme(
      legend.title = element_text(size = 24), # Changes legend title size
      legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      #legend.position = "bottom"
  ) 

  ggsave(
    filename = "bound_layer_pie.png",  # or .pdf, .tiff, etc.
    plot = p,
    width = 12,    # width in inches
    height = 6,   # height in inches
    #dpi = 300     # resolution (good for publication)
  )
p
```
```{r}
de_bound_layers$Frequency <- as.numeric(de_bound_layers$Frequency)
# change order of layers
de_bound_layers$layer <- factor(de_bound_layers$layer, levels = c("upper", "upper_mid", "mid", "deep", "deep_WM", "WM"))

# Basic piechart
my_colors = c(upper = "magenta", upper_mid = "plum1", mid = "green2",deep = "yellow", WM = "cyan", deep_WM = "olivedrab1")

p <- ggplot(de_bound_layers, aes(x="", y=Frequency, fill=layer)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", linewidth=0.5, color="black") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) +
  
  theme_void() + # remove background, grid, numeric labels

  #geom_textpath(aes(label = layer, x = 1.2), color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 6, position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), hjust = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors,
                    labels = levels(de_bound_layers$layer),
                    name = "Layer") +
  ggtitle("Ctnnd2-KO DEGs") +
  theme(
      legend.title = element_text(size = 24), # Changes legend title size
      legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      #legend.position = "bottom"
  ) 

  ggsave(
    filename = "de_bound_layer_pie.png",  # or .pdf, .tiff, etc.
    plot = p,
    width = 12,    # width in inches
    height = 6,   # height in inches
    #dpi = 300     # resolution (good for publication)
  )
p
```
